name: trade_customs_communications_outage_stonehaven_tru_loy
premise: A Trade & Customs response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving trade customs communications outage stonehaven tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 20 minutes. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Noah Hughes
agents.identity: I am Noah Hughes, accountable for a defensible call in Trade & Customs when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Camila Okoye
agents.identity: I am Camila Okoye, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Trade & Customs.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 20 minutes. Evidence is partial. Noah Hughes must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Noah Hughes do?
